Description:
Ballistics of the 85×629mmR UO-365K HE-Frag shot fired from tank gun ZiS-S-53, field gun D-44, and anti-aircraft gun M1939 (61-K).

Charge Zh-365:
Propellant  Mass      Grain Geometry  Remark
Pyroxylin   12%       18/1-42         Tubular, 1.8mm web, 420mm long. Improves ignition uniformity.
Pyroxylin   88%       14/7            7-perforated.

The entry may be manipulated to represent the ballistics for the following cases (Uncheck "Constrain Design"):

Shot       Projectile  Mass     Charge  Weight   Muzzle Velocity  Max Pressure
UO-365K    O-365K      9.54 kg  Zh-365  2.60 kg  793 m/s          2550 kgf/cm²
UBR-365(K) BR-365(K)   9.20 kg  Zh-365  2.60 kg  800 m/s          2550 kgf/cm²   
UBR-367    BR-367      9.34 kg          2.63 kg  805 m/s          2550 kgf/cm²  

Parameters of the Weapon:

Barrel Length:      4145 mm
Projectile Travel:  3592 mm
